content.text:
Implemented the fix in `langchain4j-open-ai/src/main/java/dev/langchain4j/model/openai/OpenAiStreamingResponseBuilder.java`.

What changed:
- `OpenAiStreamingResponseBuilder.append(...)` now iterates over every `ToolCall` in `delta.toolCalls()`.
- Previously it only processed `delta.toolCalls().get(0)`, dropping additional tool calls present in the same streaming delta.
- Existing per-tool-call accumulation behavior is reused for each entry.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the bug with two tool calls in the same delta.
- Confirmed the test failed before the fix:
  - expected 2 tool execution requests, got 1.
- Applied the fix.
- Re-ran the focused test successfully:
  - `Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0`
- Removed the temporary test afterward as requested.

Final working tree change:
- Only the production source file is modified.
- No test files remain modified.
- No commit was created.
